hooks.command: input=$(cat); s=$(printf "%s" "$input" | jq -r ".session_id // empty"); active=$(printf "%s" "$input" | jq -r ".stop_hook_active // false"); marker="${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/claude-review-pending-$s"; if [ "$active" = "true" ]; then rm -f "$marker"; exit 0; fi; if [ -f "$marker" ]; then rm -f "$marker"; jq -n --arg r "This turn changed files. Before stopping, review ONLY this turn's changes (run git diff for tracked files and check any new/untracked files) for correctness bugs and clear simplification/optimization wins. Apply low-risk fixes directly and briefly report anything riskier; keep it proportional to the change. Use the code-review or simplify skill if helpful, then stop." '{decision:"block",reason:$r}'; fi; exit 0
